---
title: "DecoderDispatch"
---

## Overview

`DecoderDispatch` provides type-safe dispatch from `DecoderVariant` parameter
alternatives to static `TensorTo*` `decode()` calls. It centralizes factory-name
and DataManager-type mapping used by `SlotAssembler`, `OutputSlotWidget`, and
model metadata (`recommended_decoder` hints).

**Location:** `src/DeepLearning/channel_decoding/DecoderDispatch.hpp`  
**Implementation:** `src/DeepLearning/channel_decoding/DecoderDispatch.cpp`

Concrete decoders register via `DecoderFactory` (`DecoderFactory.hpp`) for
name-based lookup; `DecoderDispatch` is the params-variant entry point used
during inference.

## Pipeline position

```
encoder output [B, C, H, W]
     → (optional) PostEncoderModule::apply()   // torch → torch
     → decodeToGeometry() / TensorTo*::decode() // torch → geometry / vector
     → DataManager write
```

`DecoderContext` (in `ChannelDecoder.hpp`) carries runtime indexing and
coordinate scaling. Per-decoder user settings live in `*DecoderParams` structs
in the same header.

## Decoder registry mapping

| Params struct | Factory name | `dataTypeForDecoder()` | Spatial 4D? | Output type |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `MaskDecoderParams` | `TensorToMask2D` | `MaskData` | yes | `Mask2D` |
| `PointDecoderParams` | `TensorToPoint2D` | `PointData` | yes | `Point2D<float>` |
| `LineDecoderParams` | `TensorToLine2D` | `LineData` | yes | `Line2D` |
| `FeatureVectorDecoderParams` | `TensorToFeatureVector` | `TensorData` | no | `std::vector<float>` |

See the per-decoder pages for algorithm details:
[TensorToMask2D](TensorToMask2D.qmd),
[TensorToPoint2D](TensorToPoint2D.qmd),
[TensorToLine2D](TensorToLine2D.qmd),
[TensorToFeatureVector](TensorToFeatureVector.qmd).

## API

| Function | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `decodeToGeometry(tensor, ctx, params)` | Decode using typed params or `DecoderVariant` |
| `isSpatialDecoderParams<Params>()` | Compile-time: params need 4D `[B,C,H,W]` input |
| `isSpatialDecoder(params)` | Runtime variant of the above |
| `dataTypeForDecoderParams<Params>()` / `dataTypeForDecoder(params)` | Map to `MaskData`, `PointData`, etc. |
| `decoderFactoryName<Params>()` / `decoderFactoryName(params)` | Map to `TensorToMask2D`, etc. |
| `decoderParamsFromFactoryName(name)` | Default params from model `recommended_decoder` hint |

## Types

- `DecoderVariant` — `rfl::TaggedUnion` of all `*DecoderParams` structs (defined in
  `bindings/EncoderDecoderBindingTypes.hpp`)
- `DecodedGeometryVariant` — `std::variant<Mask2D, Point2D<float>, Line2D, std::vector<float>>`

`DecodedOutputVariant` in `BatchInferenceResult.hpp` aliases `DecodedGeometryVariant`.

`decodeToGeometry()` always calls each decoder's primary `decode()` method.
`TensorToPoint2D::decodeMultiple()` is available for multi-peak extraction but is
not wired through dispatch or `SlotAssembler` today.

## SlotAssembler integration

`SlotAssembler::makeDecoderContext()` populates `DecoderContext` from output slot
metadata:

- `source_channel` — fixed at `0` (first channel)
- `batch_index` — current batch element
- `height` / `width` — last two entries of the slot shape when `shape.size() >= 2`
- `target_image_size` — source image size for coordinate upscaling

Spatial decoders are skipped (with a logged error) when the output tensor rank is
less than 4.

## Tests

`tests/DeepLearning/channel_decoding/DecoderDispatch.test.cpp` — factory-name
mapping, DataManager type mapping, `decoderParamsFromFactoryName` round-trip,
`isSpatialDecoder`, and end-to-end mask decode via `decodeToGeometry`.

Filter with `ctest -R "decoder_dispatch"`.
